required_teams.team_description: Safely evacuate participants, manage bottlenecks, prevent stampede
Establish medical triage, prioritize injuries, manage casualty zones
Manage media relations, counter misinformation, handle communications
Security response, threat assessment, coordinate with evacuation

inject_templates.template: Shots fired at {venue}. Panic spreads. Active shooter location unknown. Limited cover available.
Conflicting reports on shooter location. Crowd stampede risk at exits. Water boundary may limit escape routes.
Shooter last seen near {landmark}. Multiple casualties reported. Crowd density high at main exit.
EMS delayed. Triage site needed. Coordinate evacuation flow to avoid bottleneck.

decision_branches.trigger_condition: when coordination centre decides evacuate vs shelter-in-place
decision_branches.inject_template: Shooter location still unclear. Evacuate now or shelter? Each option has risks.

decision_branches.trigger_condition: when media team submits first public statement
decision_branches.inject_template: Public statement needed. Avoid revealing tactical information. Calm public.
